content: State of Play returns Tuesday, June 2 with more than 60 minutes of updates, announcements, and gameplay reveals from top studios around the world. To kick things off, you’ll get a closer look at Marvel’s Wolverine. Insomniac Games will share more from its upcoming third-person action-adventure game showing off Logan’s brutal and relentless combat along with some new details. This all-new take on the comic book legend launches on PS5 September 15. Watch the State of Play broadcast live Tuesday, June 2 at 2:00pm PT / 5:00pm ET / 11:00pm CEST | June 3 at 6:00am JST on YouTube and Twitch. The broadcast will be in English, with Japanese subtitles also available. We hope to see you then! Regarding co-streaming and video-on-demand (VOD) Please note that this broadcast may include copyrighted content (e.g. licensed music) that Sony Interactive Entertainment does not control. We welcome and celebrate our amazing co-streamers and creators, but licensing agreements outside our control could interfere with co-streams or VOD archives of this broadcast. If you’re planning to save this broadcast as a VOD to create recap videos, or to repost clips or segments from the show, we advise omitting any copyrighted music.
chineseContent: State of Play 将于 6 月 2 日星期二回归，带来来自世界各地顶级工作室的 60 多分钟的更新、公告和游戏玩法展示。首先，您将近距离观察漫威的金刚狼。 Insomniac Games 将分享其即将推出的第三人称动作冒险游戏的更多内容，展示洛根残酷无情的战斗以及一些新细节。这个漫画传奇人物的全新演绎将于 9 月 15 日在 PS5 上推出。观看 State of Play 直播，时间为 6 月 2 日星期二下午 2:00 太平洋时间/下午 5:00 东部时间/晚上 11:00 欧洲中部夏令时间 | 6 月 3 日上午 6:00（日本标准时间）在 YouTube 和 Twitch 上发布。广播将以英语进行，也有日语字幕。我们希望届时见到您！关于联合流媒体和视频点播 (VOD) 请注意，此广播可能包含索尼互动娱乐无法控制的受版权保护的内容（例如授权音乐）。我们欢迎并庆祝我们出色的联合流媒体和创作者，但我们无法控制的许可协议可能会干扰该广播的联合流媒体或 VOD 档案。如果您打算将此广播另存为 VOD 以创建回顾视频，或重新发布节目中的剪辑或片段，我们建议您忽略任何受版权保护的音乐。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
